api_decisions.label: Maps JavaScript API
api_decisions.rationale: [DOC] Use for client-side interactive web maps, map styling, markers, custom data layers, and Maps JavaScript services.

api_decisions.label: Places API (New)
api_decisions.rationale: [DOC] Use for place search, autocomplete, and place details with field minimization and place IDs.
required_controls: server-side key for web service calls

api_decisions.label: Geocoding API
api_decisions.rationale: [DOC] Use to convert addresses, coordinates, or place IDs into coordinates, place IDs, or human-readable addresses.
required_controls: avoid geocoding on every page load
server-side key for web service calls

api_decisions.label: Directions API (Legacy)
api_decisions.rationale: [DOC] Use only when legacy Directions API is explicitly required; Google marks the product as Legacy and points migration toward newer services.
required_controls: evaluate newer Routes API before production build

library_decisions.label: Advanced Markers
library_decisions.rationale: [DOC] Advanced Markers support customizable markers, keyboard/click interaction, and require a map ID.
required_controls: click listener for keyboard focus when interactive

library_decisions.label: @googlemaps/markerclusterer
library_decisions.rationale: [DOC] Marker clustering groups nearby markers to simplify dense map displays and improve visual clarity.
required_controls: cluster behavior tested at expected zoom levels
